description: The logo features an abstract graphic above the company name. The graphic consists of two curved, elongated, tear-drop like shapes in dark blue and light blue, with three concentric arc lines resembling signal waves emanating from the top. Below the graphic, the text "TRE" is in large, bold, blue capital letters, followed by "ALTAMiRA" in smaller, blue capital letters, with a small yellow dot replacing the 'i'. Underneath, in smaller blue text, it states "A CLS Group Company".
